input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixPriceOracleOrder.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixPriceOracleOrder: Fixes an issue where the order of asset pair data is different from when a price oracle is created versus when it is updated. This amendment ensures asset pairs follow a canonical order at all times, so you can predictably look up asset prices.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixPriceOracleOrder appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 3.0.0.
